Midjourney vs DALL-E (2026): Which Should You Use?

Midjourney and DALL-E are both popular tools in the AI Image Generators space. Here's how they compare.

MidjourneyDALL-E
MakerMidjourney, Inc.OpenAI
PricingPlans start at $10/mo; no permanent free tierIncluded with ChatGPT Plus ($20/mo); limited free use in ChatGPT
Free tierNoYes
Best forArtists and designers wanting the highest-quality stylized images.Users who already use ChatGPT and want inline image generation.

One of the most popular AI image generators, known for highly artistic, polished output.
